qna_pairs.Query: How long does coffee beans degrade as it ages?
qna_pairs.Gold Answer: Surface area plays a large part in the degradation process, so ground coffee degrades considerably faster than whole coffee beans.

qna_pairs.Query: What is the optimal ratio of ground coffee to water for espresso?
qna_pairs.Gold Answer: A good guide for making espresso is ¼ oz (7 g) ground beans per 1½ oz (45 ml) water.

qna_pairs.Query: In which type of brewing method does coffee extract its flavors most efficiently?
qna_pairs.Gold Answer: Cooler water will not extract flavors as efficiently as hot water, but boiling water can make an overly bitter brew, especially with very dark roasts.
